title: Improving grocery conversion for weekly basket builders will increase Add-to-Cart rate by 15%
description: We believe that reducing friction in the weekly grocery flow — specifically around list management, substitution anxiety, and delivery slot confidence — will increase Add-to-Cart rate from 12% to 27% for the Weekly Basket Builder persona.

assumptions.content: Weekly basket builders abandon carts primarily due to substitution anxiety
Delivery slot uncertainty causes 30% of basket abandonment

success_signals: Add-to-Cart rate increases from 12% to 20%+ within 8 weeks
kill_signals: No measurable change in Add-to-Cart after 4 weeks
User interviews show substitution is not a top-3 concern
